what: Validate local vault name format and uniqueness
why: Fail fast before touching the filesystem — catch invalid characters and duplicate names before creating any directory

success_handling.criteria: Name passes regex and is not already in the vaults table

error_handling.criteria: A vault with the same name already exists in the DB

decisions.reason: Validate name before creating the directory
decisions.rationale: Avoids orphaned directories if the DB insert fails later
